title: Why Labour is tightening UK immigration rules – and what it means for migrants and employers
summary: The UK Labour government plans to tighten immigration rules, combining stricter controls with changes affecting migrants, employers and settlement conditions.

title: What’s in the one-in-one-out migrant deal between the UK and France?
summary: An explainer on the UK-France migration deal aimed at reducing small-boat Channel crossings through a one-in-one-out return mechanism.

title: How the Trump administration plans to keep tabs on migrant children
summary: The Trump administration is conducting a broad review of migrant children who crossed the U.S.-Mexico border without their parents, focusing on sponsors and follow-up controls.

title: Starmer and Macron announce 'one in, one out' migrant returns deal
summary: The UK and France agreed on a pilot migrant returns scheme under which France takes back some small-boat arrivals and the UK accepts others with family links.
